drl:
rule "R0"

    insert(new T1(3, $p0_0.getF0(), -5, $b0_0_1));

no-loop

    $p1_1 : T1(f0 <= 11, f1 >= -1, f0 != $b1_0_1, f3 == false)
    T0($b1_2_0 : f0, $b1_2_1 : f0)

    modify($p1_1) { setF3(true), setF1($b1_2_1), setF2($p1_1.getF0()) }
end
rule "R2"

    $p2_0 : T0(f1 == true, f1 == false)

    insert(new T1(4, $p2_0.getF0(), -5, $p2_0.isF1()));
    modify($p2_0) { setF1(true) }
end
rule "R3"

when

    T0(f1 == true, f0 <= 0.5)

end
rule "R4"
when
